tasks.label: Locate PHPUnit
tasks.command: php -v && where phpunit || echo PHPUnit not found

tasks.label: Locate PHPUnit
tasks.command: php -v; if (Get-Command phpunit -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host "phpunit found at" (Get-Command phpunit).Source } else { Write-Host "PHPUnit not found" }

tasks.label: Locate PHPUnit 2
tasks.command: php -v; if (Get-Command phpunit -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host "phpunit found at" (Get-Command phpunit).Source } else { Write-Host "PHPUnit not found" }
